step.name: audit
step.action: Read tsconfig + eslint + package manager; list legacy markers.

step.name: draft-tsconfig
step.action: Render tsconfig.strict.json with runtime-specific lib + target.

step.name: switch-pm
step.action: If monorepo, migrate to pnpm workspaces; if single, choose between npm and pnpm by repo policy.
step.decision-gate: If migration touches > 50 files, split into 2 PRs.

step.name: estimate-blast
step.action: Count files affected; if > 100, defer named-exports migration to follow-up.
